components.desc: Core frequency engine: reads stdin, lowercases, splits on [^a-z], counts occurrences. Returns dict {word: count}.
Sorts frequencies by count (desc) then word (asc). Outputs deterministic JSON: [{"word": ..., "count": ...}, ...]. No extra whitespace.
Parses --top N (default 5), reads stdin, slices top-N results, pipes through json-formatter. Entry point logic.
Fixed input file + golden.json expected output. Runs cli-interface, pipes output to 'jq -S .' and compares byte-identical.
